description_long: This is a large, four-engine jet airplane with a high-mounted swept wing and a robust, wide fuselage. The aircraft features a distinctive T-tail configuration, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. The engines are mounted in pairs under each wing, and the landing gear appears to be retractable, suited for heavy-duty operations. The livery includes a white base with blue and gray stripes, and a red accent on the tail fin, along with visible airline markings. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with multiple windows indicating a multi-seat, enclosed design.
description: A large, high-wing, four-engine jet airplane with a T-tail and distinctive airline livery. Features a forward, multi-seat cockpit and robust, swept wings.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from a front-left angle, highlighting the high-mounted swept wings, underwing engines, and the T-tail with colored fin.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the wide wingspan, four underwing engines, and the cockpit windows at the nose.
description_view_2: The airplane is viewed from a front-right angle, mirroring view 0 but from the opposite side, showing the same wing and engine configuration.
description_view_3: A direct rear view displays the T-tail structure, the full span of the wings, and the rear fuselage tapering towards the tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, swept configuration with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with multiple main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the nose of the fuselage.
